title: Claude Code vs Codex: Which Should You ACTUALLY Use?
summary: Austin Marchese compares Codex and Claude Code across five categories (user interface, technical output, design output, non-technical output, cost and speed) to advise viewers on which tool to use for faster development. He argues the Codex vs Claude Code comparison itself is the wrong question to ask and suggests focusing on a different primary consideration instead.
